meaning: 脸红的人,使脸色红润的化妆品
examples: The forgivable response is to hope and get the blusher out.
She looked very pale so she wore blusher to add some color to her face.
Make-up favourites like eye shadow, blusher, fake tan and foundation can contain carcinogens.
He was a blusher. (That embarrassed him, too.) So, he just grew silent.
Men were also partial to a hint of blusher to give them a healthy glow, particularly officers such as Mr Wickham.
